frameworks.name: TanStack Start React
frameworks.description: A framework for building web applications with TanStack Start and React.

starters.name: Basic
starters.description: A basic starter kit for building web applications with TanStack Start and React. Use template if no other templates are a close match.

starters.name: AI Chat
starters.description: A weather chat assistant powered by TanStack AI with multi-provider support. Use this when the customer wants an AI chat application.

starters.name: Blog
starters.description: A travel blog built with content-collections and TanStack Start. Use this when the customer wants a content-driven blog or editorial site.

starters.name: Calculator
starters.description: A template for building single page calculators. Use this when the customer wants to create a calculator style application.

starters.name: Dashboard
starters.description: An analytics dashboard with charts built with Chart.js and Tailwind CSS. Use this when the customer wants a dashboard or data visualization app.

starters.name: Ecommerce
starters.description: An ecommerce site with Stripe checkout built with TanStack Start. Use this when the customer wants an online store or product catalog with payments.

starters.name: Marketing
starters.description: A marketing site built with TanStack Start. Use this when the customer wants a marketing or promotional landing page.

starters.name: Portfolio
starters.description: A developer portfolio with resume, blog, projects, and contact form built with content-collections. Use this when the customer wants a personal or professional portfolio site.

starters.name: Resume
starters.description: Professional resume template with content-collections and shadcn UI components. Use this when the customer wants a resume or CV site.

starters.name: SaaS
starters.description: A SaaS landing page with pricing, features, and FAQ built with TanStack Start and Tailwind CSS. Use this when the customer wants a SaaS or product landing page.

starters.name: Survey
starters.description: A survey form using Netlify Forms with TanStack Start. Use this when the customer wants a survey, form, or data-collection application.
